data.title: Wall Street Panic Extends To Main Street As US-China Trade War Escalates, Bond Vigilantes Make A Comeback: This Week In Markets
data.description: Volatility sparked by Trump's tariffs extended beyond Wall St, challenging the long-held narrative of US economic exceptionalism. Dollar & bond market rattled, while gold surged. Positive momentum faded as uncertainty loomed and consumer sentiment plunged to 3-year lows.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Hit 7.1% As Bond Market Volatility, Trade Tariffs Shake Markets
data.description: Mortgage rates hit 2-month high at 7.1% due to trade tariffs and inflation data, causing volatility and concerns about housing market.

data.title: Nike's Sneaker Buzz And Tariff Risks Could Shape Its Future: Analyst
data.description: Nike Inc. (NYSE: NKE) is gaining momentum with high-heat sneaker drops and its new ReactX Rejuven8 slip-ons, says Needham's Tom Nikic. The analyst highlights tariff risks and rising buzz around Nike's innovations, which could challenge rivals like Crocs Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX).

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Expects S&P 500 Growth Forecast To Be Cut
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon offered more insights on President Donald Trump's tariff policies and the possible effects on businesses and the economy during the company's first-quarter earnings call on Friday morning.

data.title: Compass Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (12 Ratings)
